message:
fix(core): fix 5 pre-existing test failures in tailer, differential_snapshot, policy

- Update 3 tailer scheduler tests to match anti-starvation algorithm that reserves
  slots for low-priority panes (select_panes now splits high/low tiers)
- Update differential_snapshot test: capture_diff now emits both metadata and
  scrollback diffs independently (was else-if, now independent if checks)
- Update policy test: rule_id changed from "command.git_reset_hard" to
  "dcg.core.git:reset-hard"

All 16,684 lib tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
